name: Odd-Eyes Solblaze Dragon
name_jp: オッドアイズ・ソルブレイズ・ドラゴン
desc:
1 Tuner + 1+ non-Tuners
If this card is Special Summoned: You can Special Summon 1 face-up Pendulum Monster from your Extra Deck, but you cannot Special Summon, except Pendulum Monsters, while you control that face-up monster. If this card is in your GY: You can banish 2 other monsters (Fusion/Synchro/Xyz/Pendulum) from your GY; Special Summon this card. You can only use 1 "Odd-Eyes Solblaze Dragon" effect per turn, and only once that turn.

jp_sets.set: Yu-Gi-Oh! OCG Structures Volume 9 promotional card

summoning: Does not require specific Synchro Materials
Special Summons from your Extra Deck
